headline: Drug Seizures Total RM4.8 Billion With Meth Dominating
context: PDRM narcotics seized drugs valued at RM4.8 billion in 2025 with methamphetamine comprising 68% by value.

cards.big: Drug seizures reached RM4.8 billion in 2025 with meth at 68%
cards.sub: Malaysia remains major transit point for regional trafficking networks

cards.big: 82,000 drug arrests in 2025 but trafficking conviction rate only 35%
cards.sub: Evidentiary requirements lead many charges reduced to possession

cards.big: Prisons hold 28,000 drug offenders comprising 40% of total population
cards.sub: Incarceration cost reached RM1.2 billion annually in 2025

cards.big: Drug overdose deaths reached 1,200 in 2025 up from 840 in 2022
cards.sub: Harm reduction covers only 15% of estimated 400,000 drug users

cards.big: Drug policy tests whether enforcement or harm reduction better serves public health
RM4.8 billion in drug seizures with meth dominant. Enforcement without demand reduction treats symptoms, not causes.
